chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Hello friends, welcome to the part 2 of the computer training course.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Today we are going to master the backbone of the computer i.e. the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In this video, you will get the complete practical training of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will understand all the options step by step and will also see them in real.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Today you will learn all the tools and icons of the taskbar,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to customize the taskbar as per your needs,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to make the size of the icon small or large,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to connect the internet to the computer,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to use the search box properly,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and many more tasks.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In simple words, after this video, you will be able to control your computer in a completely new way.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But before starting the video, a small but very special thing,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Thanks to all the friends who subscribe to GIS Tech Guru.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Due to your love, trust and continuous support,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: today we have completed the milestone of 250 subscribers.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This journey was not possible without you.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I am sure that with your support, we will soon reach 1000, 2000 and beyond.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Once again, thank you so much for your incredible support

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and truly appreciate each and every one of you.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's start the video without wasting time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, the strip that you see just below your desktop screen is called the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is not just a line, but a control center for windows.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you work in the office or do multitasking,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the hidden features of the taskbar can do your work in minutes.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We have learned about the start button in the last video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Today we will master the rest of the options of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, come to this search box next to the start button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many people think that this is just to find the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But it works like an assistant in corporate life.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Its basic use is that you type any program like chrome, excel, file or setting name and enter it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It will open immediately.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is no need to move the mouse.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let me tell you a pro tip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose you are working on excel and you want to do a calculation quickly.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not open the calculator.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Type directly in the search box.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: 55 x 20 and see the result will come there.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We can also do a web search from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For this, it is necessary to have internet connection in the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So type directly here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: GIS Tech Guru YouTube channel.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you press enter, the result will come in front of you.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You have to search something else like UHD to INR or smart way to save time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's come to this small icon called task view.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you work by opening 10 windows at the same time, then this feature is for you.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you click it, all your open windows come together.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can easily choose which one to go to.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It also has a shortcut.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can also go to your open windows from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But its most powerful feature is the new desktop.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is virtual desktop.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Imagine you are doing heavy work at the office.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Excel, PPT, AutoCAD is open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you have to do personal browsing with a little break.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not minimize everything.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just click on new desktop.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now it has become a completely new and clean computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Desktop 1 office work.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Boss safe zone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Desktop 2 personal work.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can listen to any browsing music here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can switch from office mode to relax mode in one click.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Without closing the windows.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Corporate professionals use it to increase their focus.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After the search box, this big part is called the quick launch or pin app area.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you can see all the open software folders.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And the software you use daily.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like Chrome, Excel, AutoCAD, ArcGIS.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Why waste time in searching and opening them again and again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We can pin them here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And when you want to open, the software will open directly with a single click.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see how.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose I need Excel a lot.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Type Excel in the search box.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Right click on the mouse.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And select pin to taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Boom.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now the Excel icon will always be on your taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can open it at any time with a single click.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And there is another way to pin the software here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose I opened MS Word from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, I will right click here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So see here is the option, pin to taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We can also pin from here to the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But it is important to understand a technical thing here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How to find out if the software is only pin or actually open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Look carefully, I opened file explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as it opened, a small blue line came under the icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Blue line means the program is active.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That means it is running in the RAM.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If I minimize it, the window will hide.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But the blue line will remain there.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This means the work is still going on in the background.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is not closed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If I close it from here, now see the blue line is gone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This means the program is completely closed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: A small pro tip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can also set these icons according to your own.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just press and hold the left click with the mouse.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And drag and set it wherever you want.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Keep your important program at the forefront.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If your taskbar is full but the software is important.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then you can pin it in the start menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The process is the same.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Search, right click and this time choose pin to start.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now when you press the start button,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: that software will be visible to you as a tile in front.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And it will turn on as soon as you click left.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And yes, if any software is not necessary now.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And it is increasing the crowd.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then it should also be removed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Right click on the icon and unpin from the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It will move from there.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But it will not be deleted from the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, organize your taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And increase your speed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now we come to the far right side of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is called the notification area or system tray.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is your PC's health monitor.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, this small arrow is visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By clicking it, you can see the software.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Which is quietly running in the background.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, this is the battery icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Most important for the laptop user.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click it and check how much battery is left.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So that the laptop does not shut down during the meeting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Next to it is the network and internet icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to connect the office's wifi or mobile hotspot.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then click here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the network icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then turn on the wifi from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select your network.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Enter the password and connect.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now your PC is connected to the internet.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is an airplane mode nearby.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To close all networks.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And there is a mobile hotspot option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To share the PC's net.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's move on to the speaker icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From here you can increase or decrease the volume.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if you type Hindi-English.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then this English icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Is to change your keyboard layout.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After that, the time and date is shown here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can click here and see the calendar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will understand about this in detail in the next video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's move on.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See this message icon in the corner.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you click on it, the action center opens.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you will see all the notifications, emails, updates.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And below is the quick action.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you click on expand, then all the options will be visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's know some of the useful options from this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Battery saver.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To increase the battery life.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Screen brightness will be reduced a little.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or there is a Bluetooth option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Wireless mouse or headphone to connect.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or there is an option of night light.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you work late at night.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then turn it on.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will reduce the blue light of the screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So that there is no strain on the eyes.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And now a pro tip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here is the option of screen snip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But leave the mouse.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press on the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Windows plus shift plus S.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This shortcut is the favorite of corporate life.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Take a screenshot of anything.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And immediately paste it on mail or chat.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From here you can control the screen brightness.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you lift the slider, the light is less.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you do right, the light is more.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Set it according to the comfort of your eyes.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, today we understood the tools and their use of taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But now change the look of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And advanced windows management is left.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The video is getting a little long.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So in the next video we will learn.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Change the color of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Move it to the top or side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And increase the speed with keyboard shortcuts.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Don't miss that video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you like the video, then like it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And subscribe to the channel.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See you in the next video.
